name: start_codegen_session
title: Start Codegen Session
description: Start a new code generation session to record Playwright actions

outputPath.description: Directory path where generated tests will be saved (use absolute path)

testNamePrefix.description: Prefix to use for generated test names (default: 'GeneratedTest')

includeComments.description: Whether to include descriptive comments in generated tests

name: end_codegen_session
title: End Codegen Session
description: End a code generation session and generate the test file

sessionId.description: ID of the session to end

name: get_codegen_session
title: Get Codegen Session
description: Get information about a code generation session

sessionId.description: ID of the session to retrieve

name: clear_codegen_session
title: Clear Codegen Session
description: Clear a code generation session without generating a test

sessionId.description: ID of the session to clear

name: playwright_navigate
title: Playwright Navigate
description: Navigate to a URL

url.description: URL to navigate to the website specified

browserType.description: Browser type to use (chromium, firefox, webkit). Defaults to chromium

headless.description: Run browser in headless mode (default: false)

name: playwright_screenshot
title: Playwright Screenshot
description: Take a screenshot of the current page or a specific element

selector.description: CSS selector for element to screenshot

storeBase64.description: Store screenshot in base64 format (default: true)

fullPage.description: Store screenshot of the entire page (default: false)

savePng.description: Save screenshot as PNG file (default: false)

downloadsDir.description: Custom downloads directory path (default: user's Downloads folder)

name: playwright_click
title: Playwright Click
description: Click an element on the page

selector.description: CSS selector for the element to click

name: playwright_iframe_click
title: Playwright Iframe Click
description: Click an element in an iframe on the page

iframeSelector.description: CSS selector for the iframe containing the element to click

selector.description: CSS selector for the element to click

name: playwright_iframe_fill
title: Playwright Iframe Fill
description: Fill an element in an iframe on the page

iframeSelector.description: CSS selector for the iframe containing the element to fill

selector.description: CSS selector for the element to fill

name: playwright_fill
title: Playwright Fill
description: fill out an input field

name: playwright_select
title: Playwright Select
description: Select an element on the page with Select tag

selector.description: CSS selector for element to select

name: playwright_hover
title: Playwright Hover
description: Hover an element on the page

selector.description: CSS selector for element to hover

name: playwright_evaluate
title: Playwright Evaluate
description: Execute JavaScript in the browser console

name: playwright_console_logs
title: Playwright Console Logs
description: Retrieve console logs from the browser with filtering options

type.description: Type of logs to retrieve (all, error, warning, log, info, debug, exception)

search.description: Text to search for in logs (handles text with square brackets)

limit.description: Maximum number of logs to return

clear.description: Whether to clear logs after retrieval (default: false)

name: playwright_get
title: Playwright Get
description: Perform an HTTP GET request

name: playwright_post
title: Playwright Post
description: Perform an HTTP POST request

value.description: Data to post in the body

headers.description: Additional headers to include in the request

name: playwright_put
title: Playwright Put
description: Perform an HTTP PUT request

value.description: Data to PUT in the body

name: playwright_patch
title: Playwright Patch
description: Perform an HTTP PATCH request

value.description: Data to PATCH in the body

name: playwright_delete
title: Playwright Delete
description: Perform an HTTP DELETE request

name: playwright_expect_response
title: Playwright Expect Response
description: Ask Playwright to start waiting for a HTTP response. This tool initiates the wait operation but does not wait for its completion.

id.description: Unique & arbitrary identifier to be used for retrieving this response later with `Playwright_assert_response`.

url.description: URL pattern to match in the response.

name: playwright_assert_response
title: Playwright Assert Response
description: Wait for and validate a previously initiated HTTP response wait operation.

id.description: Identifier of the HTTP response initially expected using `Playwright_expect_response`.

value.description: Data to expect in the body of the HTTP response. If provided, the assertion will fail if this value is not found in the response body.

name: playwright_custom_user_agent
title: Playwright Custom User Agent
description: Set a custom User Agent for the browser

userAgent.description: Custom User Agent for the Playwright browser instance

name: playwright_drag
title: Playwright Drag
description: Drag an element to a target location

sourceSelector.description: CSS selector for the element to drag

targetSelector.description: CSS selector for the target location

name: playwright_press_key
title: Playwright Press Key
description: Press a keyboard key

selector.description: Optional CSS selector to focus before pressing key

name: playwright_click_and_switch_tab
title: Playwright Click And Switch Tab
description: Click a link and switch to the newly opened tab

selector.description: CSS selector for the link to click

name: puppeteer_navigate
title: Puppeteer Navigate
description: Navigate to a URL

launchOptions.description: PuppeteerJS LaunchOptions. Default null. If changed and not null, browser restarts. Example: { headless: true, args: ['--no-sandbox'] }

allowDangerous.description: Allow dangerous LaunchOptions that reduce security. When false, dangerous args like --no-sandbox will throw errors. Default false.

name: puppeteer_screenshot
title: Puppeteer Screenshot
description: Take a screenshot of the current page or a specific element

selector.description: CSS selector for element to screenshot

encoded.description: If true, capture the screenshot as a base64-encoded data URI (as text) instead of binary image content. Default false.

name: puppeteer_click
title: Puppeteer Click
description: Click an element on the page

selector.description: CSS selector for element to click

name: puppeteer_fill
title: Puppeteer Fill
description: Fill out an input field

name: puppeteer_select
title: Puppeteer Select
description: Select an element on the page with Select tag

selector.description: CSS selector for element to select

name: puppeteer_hover
title: Puppeteer Hover
description: Hover an element on the page

selector.description: CSS selector for element to hover

name: puppeteer_evaluate
title: Puppeteer Evaluate
description: Execute JavaScript in the browser console

name: playwright_close
title: Playwright Close
description: Close the browser and release all resources

name: playwright_get_visible_text
title: Playwright Get Visible Text
description: Get the visible text content of the current page

name: playwright_get_visible_html
title: Playwright Get Visible Html
description: Get the HTML content of the current page

name: playwright_go_back
title: Playwright Go Back
description: Navigate back in browser history

name: playwright_go_forward
title: Playwright Go Forward
description: Navigate forward in browser history

name: playwright_save_as_pdf
title: Playwright Save As Pdf
description: Save the current page as a PDF file

outputPath.description: Directory path where PDF will be saved

filename.description: Name of the PDF file (default: page.pdf)

name: tavily-search
title: Tavily-Search
description: A powerful web search tool that provides comprehensive, real-time results using Tavily's AI search engine. Returns relevant web content with customizable parameters for result count, content type, and domain filtering. Ideal for gathering current information, news, and detailed web content analysis.

search_depth.description: The depth of the search. It can be 'basic' or 'advanced'

topic.description: The category of the search. This will determine which of our agents will be used for the search

days.description: The number of days back from the current date to include in the search results. This specifies the time frame of data to be retrieved. Please note that this feature is only available when using the 'news' search topic

time_range.description: The time range back from the current date to include in the search results. This feature is available for both 'general' and 'news' search topics

max_results.description: The maximum number of search results to return

include_images.description: Include a list of query-related images in the response

include_image_descriptions.description: Include a list of query-related images and their descriptions in the response

include_raw_content.description: Include the cleaned and parsed HTML content of each search result

include_domains.description: A list of domains to specifically include in the search results, if the user asks to search on specific sites set this to the domain of the site

exclude_domains.description: List of domains to specifically exclude, if the user asks to exclude a domain set this to the domain of the site

country.description: Boost search results from a specific country. This will prioritize content from the selected country in the search results. Available only if topic is general.

name: tavily-extract
title: Tavily-Extract
description: A powerful web content extraction tool that retrieves and processes raw content from specified URLs, ideal for data collection, content analysis, and research tasks.

urls.description: List of URLs to extract content from

extract_depth.description: Depth of extraction - 'basic' or 'advanced', if usrls are linkedin use 'advanced' or if explicitly told to use advanced

include_images.description: Include a list of images extracted from the urls in the response

format.description: The format of the extracted web page content. markdown returns content in markdown format. text returns plain text and may increase latency.

name: tavily-crawl
title: Tavily-Crawl
description: A powerful web crawler that initiates a structured web crawl starting from a specified base URL. The crawler expands from that point like a tree, following internal links across pages. You can control how deep and wide it goes, and guide it to focus on specific sections of the site.

url.description: The root URL to begin the crawl

max_depth.description: Max depth of the crawl. Defines how far from the base URL the crawler can explore.

max_breadth.description: Max number of links to follow per level of the tree (i.e., per page)

limit.description: Total number of links the crawler will process before stopping

instructions.description: Natural language instructions for the crawler

select_paths.description: Regex patterns to select only URLs with specific path patterns (e.g., /docs/.*, /api/v1.*)

select_domains.description: Regex patterns to select crawling to specific domains or subdomains (e.g., ^docs\.example\.com$)

allow_external.description: Whether to allow following links that go to external domains

categories.description: Filter URLs using predefined categories like documentation, blog, api, etc

extract_depth.description: Advanced extraction retrieves more data, including tables and embedded content, with higher success but may increase latency

format.description: The format of the extracted web page content. markdown returns content in markdown format. text returns plain text and may increase latency.

name: tavily-map
title: Tavily-Map
description: A powerful web mapping tool that creates a structured map of website URLs, allowing you to discover and analyze site structure, content organization, and navigation paths. Perfect for site audits, content discovery, and understanding website architecture.

url.description: The root URL to begin the mapping

max_depth.description: Max depth of the mapping. Defines how far from the base URL the crawler can explore

max_breadth.description: Max number of links to follow per level of the tree (i.e., per page)

limit.description: Total number of links the crawler will process before stopping

instructions.description: Natural language instructions for the crawler

select_paths.description: Regex patterns to select only URLs with specific path patterns (e.g., /docs/.*, /api/v1.*)

select_domains.description: Regex patterns to select crawling to specific domains or subdomains (e.g., ^docs\.example\.com$)

allow_external.description: Whether to allow following links that go to external domains

categories.description: Filter URLs using predefined categories like documentation, blog, api, etc

name: search
title: Search
description: Perform a web search query
